title: Simple_PVP
description: A sleek and performance-oriented PvP resource pack specifically designed for Bedwars, featuring low-fire, short swords, and vibrant wool textures.
body:
**⚔️ Simple_PVP**

Simple_PVP is a resource pack built for players who want a fresh, competitive look for Bedwars, Skywars, and general PvP. It replaces bulky vanilla models with streamlined alternatives to keep your focus on the fight.

_🏹 Combat & PvP Adjustments_

Short Swords: Redesigned swords that take up less screen space, giving you a better view of your opponent.

Low Fire: The fire animation is lowered so it doesn't block your vision when you're hit with a firecharge or flint and steel.

Custom PvP Tools: All essential tools and armor have been tweaked to look sharper and more cohesive.

_🛡 Bedwars Essentials_

Optimized Wool: Vibrant and solid colors for wool blocks, making it easier to see paths and bases from a distance.

Redesigned Items: Unique and recognizable textures for Enderpearls, Firecharges, and Golden Apples.

Clean Armor: Simple but bold armor textures to easily identify what gear your enemies are wearing.

_🛠 Compatibility_

Designed to work perfectly with 1.8.9 and newer versions.

Works great with both Vanilla and third-party clients.
